content:
**Purpose**: Visual representation of personality development through form

**Three-Phase Architecture**:

```
Phase 1: Geometric Primitives
├── Shape Library
│ ├── Circles (nurturing/soft)
│ ├── Squares (stable/structured)
│ └── Triangles (dynamic/challenging)
├── Kinetic Properties
│ ├── Velocity mapping (conversation pace)
│ ├── Deformation (emotional volatility)
│ └── Opacity (presence/withdrawal)
└── Color Psychology
├── Hue (emotional temperature)
├── Saturation (intensity)
└── Luminance (energy level)

Phase 2: Transitional Morphing
├── Feature Emergence
│ ├── Selective detail magnification
│ ├── Progressive mesh refinement
│ └── Texture overlay blending
└── Identity Anchors
├── Consistent color signature
├── Movement patterns
└── Geometric preferences

Phase 3: Photorealistic Resolution
context: From document: # Platform-Agnostic UI Architecture: Project Evolve — chunk 3 (chunk 3/10)
